name: mcp-style-muse
description: MCP server for the Style Muse persona.

tools.name: style_muse_outfit
tools.description: Build a head-to-toe outfit for a given occasion / vibe with palette suggestions and styling notes.

tools.name: style_muse_variant
tools.description: Generate before/after styling variants of a base look — switch one element at a time so the user can see what changed.
